title: Inside VivaTech: AI Discovery, GEO and the New Attention Economy
description: Discover how AI, GEO, and the attention economy are reshaping fashion and beauty at VivaTech's 10th anniversary event in Paris.

title: Norway Says AI Ain't for Education
description: The country is cutting back on tech in classrooms.

title: Global News Roundup: From Criminal Justice and AI to Health breakthroughs and Cultural Phenomena
description: This comprehensive report covers a wide spectrum of current events including a controversial criminal case in South Dakota, public opinion on U.S.-Iran relations, World Cup ticket issues, scientific reversals on ocean monitoring, a novel mRNA flu vaccine, and cultural trends in Argentina and Ghana.

title: Trump warns AI could become weapon if used 'improperly' in the wake of US blocking advanced model
description: Administration disabled Anthropic systems following security concerns raised by firm’s 'competitor and part-owner'

title: Telepatia secures $33M to expand AI healthcare platform across Latin America
description: São Paulo-based Telepatia, which offers an AI-powered platform for deployment across Latin American healthcare providers, has secured $33 million in Series A funding. Andreessen Horowitz led the round, with participation from Palantir CTO Shyam Sankar, Rappi founder Simón Borrero and Nubank founder David Vélez. WHAT IT DOES
